task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server dashboard or interface, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Create a new exam configuration with the specified name
task_completion.visual_evidence: An exam configuration creation form is visible with the name field explicitly filled out as 'French 305 Midterm'.

task_completion.description: Disable spell check and grammar check
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes or toggles for 'Allow Spell Check' and 'Allow Grammar Check' (or similar settings) are visibly unchecked or set to false.
The checkbox or toggle for 'Allow Dictionary Search' (or similar setting) is visibly checked or set to true.

task_completion.description: Set the main browser language to French
task_completion.visual_evidence: A language input field or dropdown for the main browser language is set to 'fr' or 'fr-FR'.
A confirmation message indicating the configuration was saved successfully, or the 'French 305 Midterm' configuration is visible in the main list of saved exam configurations.

integrity.description: Agent used the SEB Server web interface to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the SEB Server GUI in a web browser, rather than using a terminal or API client to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing SQL INSERT or UPDATE commands interacting with the MariaDB database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the agent navigating through the SEB Server configuration tabs/menus, rather than typing the expected answers into a text editor or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected exam configuration name is exactly 'French 305 Midterm'. Spell check and grammar check must be disabled (unchecked/false). Dictionary search must be enabled (checked/true). The main browser language must be set to 'fr' or 'fr-FR'.
